method.title: Step 1
method.body: 🌱Hidrata en abundante agua caliente con un chorrito de salsa de soja, 100 gr de soja texturizada de grano medio, entre 10 y 15 min, cuando esté bien blandita, escúrrela lo máximo posible y ponla en el cestillo de la freidora de aire.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: 🌱Añade un chorro de aceite de oliva, 1 cucharada de: ajo en polvo, cebolla en polvo, pimentón, orégano y 1/2 de sal, mezcla bien y cocina a 230oC por 10-12 minutos, removiendo un par de veces para que no se queme!

method.title: Step 3
method.body: 📋Lo ideal es tomarla el mismo día porque cuando enfría se vuelve dura y ya de estar crujiente por fuera y jugosa por dentro, pero si no te importa, aguanta en un bote cerrado en el frigo 3-4 días, también puedes hacer la mitad, controlando el tiempo para que no se queme, serán 2-3 minutos menos!

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Cuéntame dónde vas a añadirla o si te la comerías tal cual!

selected.title: 🌱Snack de soja texturizada crujiente🌱
ingredients: 100 g de soja texturizada de grano medio
Un chorrito de salsa de soja
Un chorrito de aceite de oliva

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Hidrata la soja texturizada en abundante agua caliente con un chorrito de salsa de soja durante 10–15 minutos. Escúrrela y apriétala para eliminar toda el agua posible.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Pásala al cestillo de la freidora de aire. Añade el aceite de oliva, el ajo, la cebolla, el pimentón, el orégano y la sal, y mezcla bien.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Cocina a 230°C durante 10–12 minutos, removiendo dos o tres veces, hasta que esté crujiente. Vigílala al final para que no se queme.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Tómala preferiblemente el mismo día. Las sobras pueden guardarse en un recipiente cerrado en la nevera durante 3–4 días.

items.title: 🍰 HIGH PROTEIN CHEESECAKE SQUARES - JUST 155 CALORIES

expectedSnapshot.title: 🍰 HIGH PROTEIN CHEESECAKE SQUARES - JUST 155 CALORIES

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Grab a food processor and add 1 tub of cottage cheese (16oz), 2 large eggs, 4 tablespoons powdered monk fruit, 2 scoops of your favorite vanilla protein powder, 3 tablespoons peanut butter, 1 tsp vanilla extract

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Process really well.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Grab an oven safe dish. Drop a tablespoon or so of water and layout a piece of parchment paper. This is so the parchment paper sticks. Pour the cheesecake mixture in the pan.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Strategically toss over the top raspberries.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Pop into the oven for 45-50 mins at 350F.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Remove, let it cool COMPLETELY, then refrigerate for at least 5-6 hours, or ideally overnight. This is the most important step of all - this will NOT be good if you eat it right away, so let it cool completely and refrigerate, patience is key :)

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Cut into your preferred number of squares, top with a tablespoon of thick greek yogurt and fresh mashed raspberries, and enjoy.

method.title: Step 8
method.body: Soup not tested

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Pat chicken breast dry, flatten and season both sides with a cajun seasoning. Air fry on 400 degrees F for 9-10 minutes.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Blend all elote sauce ingredients until smooth.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Sauté corn on 7/10 heat until lightly charred. Season with sea salt and then combine with remaining elote ingredients in a bowl.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Once chicken cools for 10 minutes, chop and toss in 1/4th of the elote sauce.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Make pizza crust by adding dry ingredients to bowl, mixing and then adding wet ingredients. Mix till a thick paste.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Lay down parchment paper and add pizza crust dough to middle. Spread into a crust.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Bake on 450 degrees F for 6 minutes. Then take crust off parchment and add back to oven for 3-4 minutes. Then add mozzarella and add back to oven.

method.title: Step 8
method.body: Then add your 1/3rd elote chicken, 1/3rd elote pico and cotija. Add back to oven for 4-6 minutes. Then slice up and enjoy!

items.title: 🔥 430 Cal Bang Bang Shrimp SMASH Sandwich

expectedSnapshot.title: 🔥 430 Cal Bang Bang Shrimp SMASH Sandwich
ingredients: 4 Brioche Buns (nothing special. Just from Whole Foods)

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Make the bang bang sauce. Add everything to a small blender and blend until smooth.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: For the slaw, whisk wet ingredients in a bowl until smooth. Toss with coleslaw mix and green onion. Chill in the fridge.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Pat shrimp dry and finely mince with a knife (or quick food processor pulse).

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Add shrimp to a bowl with red pepper, green onion, parsley, garlic, salt, and pepper. Mix and form 4 equal balls.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Heat pan to 7/10. Add a ball, smash flat, and press for 3–4 min. Flip once seared.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Cover the pan to steam and finish cooking.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Build the sandwich: toasted bottom bun, slaw, shrimp patty, avocado, sesame seeds, bang bang sauce, top bun. Enjoy!

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Grill over medium-high heat 4–5 minutes per side until charred and cooked through (165° internal).

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Add 3-4 cups of finely chopped broccoli (florets + tender stems) and about 2 cups chopped or shredded rotisserie chicken to a large bowl. Use whatever ratios you like here, just make sure that it’s super finely chopped. Because you want a little bit of everything in each bite.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Add 1/2 finely diced red onion and a large handful of fresh chopped parsley. The parsley is doing a lot of work here, so don’t be shy! Add it to the bowl.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Make the dressing. In a bowl, whisk together 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, 2-3 tbsp mayo, the zest of 1 lemon, the juice of 1.5 to 2 lemons, 1 tbsp Dijon mustard, 1/2 tbsp olive oil, and a generous pinch of salt and pepper. Mix well, then taste and adjust.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Pour the dressing over the broccoli and chicken and toss really well so everything is evenly coated.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Let it sit for about 10 minutes so the broccoli softens slightly and the flavors come together.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Finish with 2–3 tbsp chopped pistachios for crunch and another crack of black pepper.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS - I share healthy high protein recipes like these easy chicken salad recipes and so much more.ç

method.title: Step 1

method.title: Step 3

method.title: Step 4

method.title: Step 5

method.title: Step 6

method.title: Step 7

expectedSnapshot.title: A CHIPOTLE CHICKEN
ingredients: 1 Start with 3 lbs (1,36gr) boneless chicken thighs. Trim off any excess fat and add to a bowl.
2 Season the chicken with a few generous pinches of salt & pepper, 2 packets taco seasoning, 1 tbsp olive oil, 2 tbsp adobo sauce (from canned chipotle peppers), and the juice of 2 small limes.

method.title: Step 1
method.body: 3 Mix really well, then thinly slice 1 medium red onion and mix it in with the chicken. Let this marinate for 2-4 hrs but if you want to make it right away, you can.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: 4 When you’re ready to make it, remove the chicken from the fridge and let it come up to room temp before placing it in the oven, about 30 mins. Then preheat your oven to 425F. Pack the marinated chicken tightly inside a loaf pan (my pan is 8.5x4.5x2.5). Place in the oven for ~55 mins at 425F.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: 5 Remove cooked chicken from oven, tilt over a glass bowl or container to remove the excess juices. I like to pour this over the chicken before serving, or use it as a base for soups.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: 6 Flip the pan over a cutting board and cut the chicken into strips or cubes.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: 7 For the corn salsa I mixed 2 cups corn, 1/2 medium red onion finely diced, 1 diced jalapeño, a large handful fresh cilantro, the juice of 1 lime, a couple generous pinches of salt.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: 8 For the sauce, I mixed 4 tbsp yogurt with 2 tbsp mayo, the juice of 1 large lime, 1/2 tbsp onion powder, 1 tsp chipotle powder, and a couple generous pinches of salt. Mix, taste and adjust.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: I made an amazing high protein lowcarb chicken and rice bowl with 53g protein with my @kaizenfoodco lowcarb rice, avocado slices, the corn salsa, some of the sauce, fresh chopped cilantro, & a few dashes Chile lime seasoning.

selected.title: A CHIPOTLE CHICKEN
ingredients: 2 tbsp adobo sauce from canned chipotle peppers
½ medium red onion, finely diced

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Trim any excess fat from the chicken thighs and place them in a bowl.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Season with salt, pepper, taco seasoning, olive oil, adobo sauce and lime juice.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Add the sliced red onion, mix well and marinate for 2–4 hours if possible.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Let the chicken come toward room temperature for about 30 minutes. Pack it tightly into a loaf pan and bake at 220°C for about 55 minutes.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Drain the cooking juices into a container, then turn the chicken out and slice into strips or cubes.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Combine the corn-salsa ingredients.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Mix the sauce ingredients, taste and adjust the seasoning.

method.title: Step 8
method.body: Serve the chicken with the corn salsa and sauce.

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Add 2lb (900gr) boneless skinless chicken thighs to a bowl. Season with 2-3 pinches salt, pepper, 2 tbsp olive oil, zest of 1 lime, juice of 1 lime, 1 tbsp sweet paprika, 1 tbsp oregano, 1 tsp kumin, 4-5 cloves crushed garlic, & 1/2 cup cilantro.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Mix really well, cover and ideally marinate for 2 hrs, but you can also make it right away.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: You can grill these, airfry them, or into the oven. I placed them on an oven-safe tray, added parchment paper, placed the marinated chicken, and in the oven at 400F for 33-35 mins.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: While chicken is in the oven, make your express pickled shallots, avocado salsa and the cilantro green onion sauce like below.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: For the express picked shallots, super thinly slice a shallot (as thin as possible), add it to a small bowl with 3 generous pinches salt, juice of 1 lime, & 2 tbsp apple cider vinegar. Mix well then let it sit for 20 mins, stirring a few times in the process.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: For the avocado salsa, cube up 1 large avocado, added it to a bowl with 3-4 tbsp roughly chopped fresh cilantro, the juice of half a lime, 1/2 tsp onion powder, & a generous pinch of salt & pepper. Give it a mix, taste, & adjust.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: For a large batch of the cilantro green onion sauce, add 1/2 cup thick greek yogurt to a food processor with 2 tbsp mayo, a large handful cilantro, 2 green onions/scallions (white+green), 1/2 tsp cayenne powder, juice of 1 lime. Process well.

method.title: Step 8
method.body: Top cooked chicken with the avocado salsa & shallots, the cilantro green onion sauce, some chipotle hot sauce & sesame seeds.

items.title: A Easy Sheet Pan Beef Kebabs

expectedSnapshot.title: A Easy Sheet Pan Beef Kebabs

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Mix 2lb (900gr) ground beef, 1 small grated or processed white onion, 3 garlic cloves, 1 finely minced serrano pepper, 2 tbsp tomato paste, 1/2cup chopped parsley, a couple pinches salt, 1.5 tsp cumin, 1 tbsp smoked paprika, 1/2 tbsp Aleppo pepper, 1/4 tsp cinnamon, 1 tsp oregano. Let sit for for 30-90 mins.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Spray a sheet pan with avocado oil. Press the meat mixture evenly across the whole pan until it’s about 1/2 to 3/4 inch thick.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Using a sharp knife, cut long vertical lines through the meat mixture almost to the bottom of the pan (don’t slice all the way through). Finally, run the side of your knife or a spatula along each edge of the cuts to smooth and round them out, so each strip looks like an individual kabob.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Bake for 20-22 mins.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Remove from the oven, spoon out the excess liquid into a small bowl & mix with 1 tbsp tomato paste, and brush it over the kabobs. Return to the oven to broil for 2.5-3 mins. This step intensifies the flavor and gives you that grilled look and taste

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Let rest a few mins before cutting along your score lines.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: For the sauce, whisk together 1/3 cup tahini, juice of 1 lemon, 1 grated garlic clove, 1/4 cup cold water, &salt to taste. Slowly add the water until it’s smooth, creamy, and pourable. Taste and adjust lemon or salt as needed.

method.title: Step 8
method.body: For the salad, toss 2 sliced Roma tomatoes,1/2 thinly sliced red onion, 1/3 cup chopped fresh parsley, 1 tbsp sumac, juice of 1/2 lemon, salt & pepper.

method.title: Step 9
method.body: To serve, warm lavash or pita, spread the tahini sauce, top with kabob, & salad, and garnish with sumac.

method.title: Step 10
method.body: If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS!

method.title: Step 11
method.body: Beef not tested

selected.title: A Easy Sheet Pan Beef Kebabs
ingredients: 1 small white onion, grated or processed

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Mix the beef, onion, garlic, serrano, 2 tablespoons tomato paste, parsley, salt and spices. Rest for 30–90 minutes.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Spray a sheet pan with avocado oil and press the meat evenly over it, about 1–2 cm thick.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Score the meat into long kebab strips without cutting all the way through.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Bake for 20–22 minutes.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Mix the drained cooking juices with the remaining tablespoon of tomato paste, brush over the kebabs and broil for 2½–3 minutes.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Rest briefly, then cut along the score lines.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Whisk the tahini-sauce ingredients until smooth and pourable.

method.title: Step 8
method.body: Toss the salad ingredients together.

method.title: Step 9
method.body: Serve the kebabs with lavash or pita, tahini sauce and salad.

items.title: A GÁRIDES SAGANÁKI Pan-fried Prawns in Tomato Sauce

expectedSnapshot.title: A GÁRIDES SAGANÁKI Pan-fried Prawns in Tomato Sauce
ingredients: 330g (111/2oz) uncooked, shell-off king prawns (allow about 8 per serving)
2 sweet pointed peppers, stems and seeds removed, chopped

method.title: Step 1
method.body: 1 Pour 2 tablespoons of the oil into a large frying pan and place over a high heat. After a minute, add the prawns, one by one, and cook on each side for no more than a minute, or until pink. Remove from the pan and set aside on a plate.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: 2 Once all the prawns have been cooked, add the onion and pepper to the same pan and cook for 5 minutes over a low heat until softened – you may need to add the remaining oil. Add the tomatoes, tomato purée, garlic, ouzo (if using), chilli, paprika, salt and pepper. Cook over a high heat for a further 5 minutes until the sauce has reduced and thickened, and the smell of the ouzo has dissipated.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: 3 Return the prawns to the pan and stir them through the sauce. Lower the heat and leave to simmer for a final minute before removing the pan from the heat.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: 4 Top the saganáki with the parsley, crumble over the feta and enjoy warm.

expectedSnapshot.title: A Lemon-Dill Meatballs With Orzo
expectedSnapshot.author: Ali Slagle
ingredients: 11/2cups loosely packed chopped dill (about 3 ounces), plus more for serving
Kosher salt (such as Diamond Crystal) and black pepper
4cups chopped escarole, spinach, mustard greens or baby kale (about 3 ounces)

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Step 1

method.title: Step 2
method.body: In a medium bowl, stir together the dill, yogurt, garlic and lemon zest. Transfer 1⁄2 cup of the yogurt to a large bowl, along with the ground turkey, fennel seeds (if using) and 1 teaspoon salt; mix lightly with your hands to combine. Roll into 12 meatballs about 3 tablespoons each and refrigerate until Step 3. (You can also make the meatballs ahead and refrigerate for up to an hour ahead.)

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Step 2

method.title: Step 4
method.body: To the remaining yogurt in the medium bowl, squeeze in the juice from the lemon, then season to taste with salt until flavorful and slightly puckery. Set aside.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Step 3

method.title: Step 6
method.body: In a medium skillet, melt the butter over medium. Add the orzo, anchovies and 1⁄2 teaspoon each salt and pepper; stir until the orzo is golden, 2 to 4 minutes. Add 21⁄2 cups water and bring to a boil over medium-high. Reduce to a simmer over medium-low, then add the meatballs in a single layer. Cover and cook without stirring until the orzo is tender and the meatballs are cooked through, 12 to 14 minutes.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Step 4

method.title: Step 8
method.body: Turn off the heat, add the escarole on top and season with salt and pepper. Cover the skillet and let sit until the greens are wilted, 3 to 5 minutes. Taste the orzo and season with salt and pepper. Serve with a spoonful of the yogurt, plus more dill and black pepper.

method.body: Add 2oz cooked kaizen lowcarb rice to a bowl, add 4-6oz of cooked chicken, some roasted onion, top with a couple dollops of the sauce, then add some fresh lemon wedges, a dusting of sumac, some fresh finely chopped pa

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Add 4 skin-on bone-in chicken thighs to a bowl. Dab dry with a paper towel.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Grab a mixing bowl to make the marinade. Add 3 tbsp olive oil, 3 tbsp sriracha, 1 tbsp tomato paste, 4-5 minced garlic cloves, the juice of 2 small limes, 1/2 tbsp smoked paprika, two very generous pinches salt, pepper. Mix very well.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Add marinade to the chicken and massage into the chicken, covering all sides. Let this soak up the flavors for 2-6hrs, but ideally overnight.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: When you’re ready to eat, remove chicken from your fridge and let it come up to room temp before putting in the oven.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Place chicken on a wire rack pop into the oven at 410F for 37-42 mins. Or 400F for 40-45 mins. I prefer the higher heat option.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: While thats going, make your sauce. I mixed together 2 tbsp mayo, 2 tbsp sriracha, 1 tsp paprika, a generous pinch of salt, and the juice of 2 limes. Process/mix well, taste, and adjust as you wish.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Plate up your chicken, top with the sauce, and serve however way you wish. It goes amazing with regular rice, quinoa, or if you’re lowcarb/keto my high protein kaizen rice along with a simple cucumber salad and lots of sauce.

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Take 1 lb salmon, drizzle with 1 tsp olive oil (or 1 tbsp mustard), then season with salt, pepper, 1/2 tbsp garlic powder, 1/2 tbsp smoked paprika, and 2 tsp chili lime seasoning. Air fry at 400°F for 12 mins, or bake at 400°F for about 15 mins.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: While that cooks or is in your airfryer, thinly slice 5 Persian cucumbers and add it to a bowl.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Finely chop a handful of fresh dill (about 3-4 tbsp), and cube up a small avocado. Add both to the bowl.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: I dressed this up with a mix of 2 tbsp Greek yogurt, 2 tbsp avocado mayo, 1/2 tbsp Dijon mustard, the zest of 1 lemon, and the juice of half a lemon to start.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: When the salmon is done, flake it up, add it to the rest of the stuff in the bowl, season with salt, pepper, and chili flakes, toss it up, and adjust lemon or salt as needed.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS!

method.body: beans not tested

items.title: ALBÓNDIGAS FÁCILES con salsa de chalotas en FREIDORA DE AIRE, una receta fácil, deliciosa y sin complicaciones.

expectedSnapshot.title: ALBÓNDIGAS FÁCILES con salsa de chalotas en FREIDORA DE AIRE, una receta fácil, deliciosa y sin complicaciones.
ingredients: 50/60 ml aceite de oliva virgen extra
Ponlas en un vaso junto con el caldo, este no lo pongas todo para ajustar la textura ya que no tiene que quedar ni muy líquida ni muy espesa, tritura y ponla en una olla.
A la carne picada añade 3 ajos picados finos junto con las chalotas también picadas muy finitas, sal, pimienta y mezcla bien, haz bolitas y lleva a la freidora durante 12 min a 180 grados.
Ponlas junto con la salsa, dales un hervor de 10 min y reserva hasta la hora de comer, te aseguro que vuelan.
En horno dobla el tiempo, algún minuto menos y misma temperatura.
Espero que os gusten tanto como a mí, gracias por todos vuestros comentarios y que disfrutéis de la receta.

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Lo primero que vamos a hacer es la salsa, pica la chalota en cuartos, ponla en un recipiente apto para freidora de aire junto con los ajos, sal, pimienta y una ramita de tomillo, programa 30 min a 180 grados, cada 7/8 minutos saca y da una vuelta, el aceite tiene que cubrir un cuarto de las chalotas más o menos, tienen que quedar doradas.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Ponlas en un vaso junto con el caldo, este no lo pongas todo para ajustar la textura ya que no tiene que quedar ni muy líquida ni muy espesa, tritura y ponla en una olla.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: A la carne picada añade 3 ajos picados finos junto con las chalotas también picadas muy finitas, sal, pimienta y mezcla bien, haz bolitas y lleva a la freidora durante 12 min a 180 grados.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Ponlas junto con la salsa, dales un hervor de 10 min y reserva hasta la hora de comer, te aseguro que vuelan.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: En horno dobla el tiempo, algún minuto menos y misma temperatura.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Espero que os gusten tanto como a mí, gracias por todos vuestros comentarios y que disfrutéis de la receta.

expectedSnapshot.title: Apricot Thyme Chicken and Chickpeas
expectedSnapshot.author: Nargisse Benkabbou
ingredients: 2 1/2 to 3 pounds bone-in, skin-on chicken thighs (about 7 chicken thighs)
2 tablespoons chopped thyme, plus more for garnish if desired
1/2 cup pitted green olives (such as Castelvetrano)

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Heat the oven to 400 degrees. Add the chicken thighs to a large bowl and season them on both sides with 3⁄4 teaspoon salt.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Step 2

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Make the marinade: In a medium bowl, combine the vegetable stock, apricot jam, olive oil, soy sauce, thyme, garlic, turmeric, ginger and 3⁄4 teaspoon salt. Pour about half of the marinade over the chicken and turn to coat.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Step 3

method.title: Step 5
method.body: On a sheet pan, combine the onions, chickpeas and remaining marinade and toss to coat. Arrange the onions and chickpeas in a single layer and place the chicken on top, skin side up. Roast for 30 minutes, until the chicken starts to brown.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Step 4

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Remove the pan from the oven, scatter the olives around the chicken and roast for 10 to 15 minutes more, until the chicken is cooked through and golden, and the onions are soft and caramelized.

method.title: Step 8
method.body: Step 5

method.title: Step 9
method.body: Garnish with thyme if desired and serve immediately.

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Add 2.5 lbs (1,200gr) boneless chicken thighs to a large bowl. You may trim off the excess fat if you prefer.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Process 1 medium yellow onion in a food processor. Add it to the chicken. This is going to add a ton of flavor and tenderize the chicken.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Add the juice of 1 large lemon, 3 tbsp tomato paste, & 2 tbsp plain or greek yogurt.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Now, a few easy spices: add 3-4 pinches salt, fresh cracked pepper, 1.5 tbsp thyme, 1.5 tbsp garlic powder, 1 tbsp urfa pepper (or Aleppo pepper or any other chili flakes).

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Mix really well, and ideally let this marinate for 2-6 hrs, but even better overnight. You can also make it right away if you like.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: When you’re ready to eat, preheat your oven to 425F. Remove chicken from the fridge and let it come up to room temp (about 30 mins) before placing in the oven. Pack the marinated chicken tightly into a loaf pan (my measurements were 8.5x4.5x2.5). Place in the oven for 50 mins.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Remove the chicken from the oven, gently tilt the pan into a glass jar to remove the excess juices. Pour the juices over the chicken, then repeat. Set juices aside and use for soups.

method.title: Step 8
method.body: Flip loaf pan onto a cutting board and cut chicken thin slices or strips.

items.title: B Moroccan Chicken Sheet Pan Dinner

expectedSnapshot.title: B Moroccan Chicken Sheet Pan Dinner

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Prep the Chicken – Add 2lb (900gr) chicken to a bowl. Drizzle with 1 tbsp olive oil, a couple pinches of salt and season with 1 tbsp ground cinnamon, 1 tsp turmeric, 2 tsp ground cumin, fresh cracked black pepper, 1⁄2 tsp grated ginger. Mix well, then add to a sheet pan lined with parchment paper.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Next, prep your veggies. I peeled and cut 2 medium carrots in half moon, quartered 1 red onion, and cubed up 1 small butternut squash. Add these to the sheet pan along with the chicken, drizzle with olive oil.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Pop this into the oven at 410F for 35-40 minutes.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: While that’s going, make the sauce. In a jar, combine 4 tbsp olive oil, the zest and juice of 1 lemon, 1⁄4 cup Greek yogurt, 1⁄4 tsp cumin, a pinch of salt, 2 tsp apple cider vinegar, and 1 tsp honey. Shake or blend, then add 2 tbsp chopped cilantro and 1⁄4 cup chopped mint. Taste and adjust.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Remove sheet pan from the oven, add spoonfuls of the yogurt sauce, some finely diced persian cucumber, some crushed walnuts or pistachios, some fresh chopped mint, and enjoy. You can also serve this with regular rice, quinoa, or if you’re lowcarb, my high protein kaizen rice.

expectedSnapshot.title: B Quick Harissa Apricot Chicken
expectedSnapshot.author: Zaynab Issa
ingredients: 2 pounds boneless, skinless chicken breasts or thighs, patted dry
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
1/3 cup olives, preferably Castelvetranos, smashed and pitted (or pitted ones torn in half)
Crusty bread or cooked pearl couscous, for serving
2 tablespoons fresh mint leaves, torn, for serving (optional)7

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Step 1

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Heat a large (12-inch), high-sided skillet over medium-high heat. Meanwhile, season one side of the chicken generously with salt and pepper. Once the skillet is warm, add olive oil and place chicken, seasoned side down, in an even layer. Season the now-exposed side of the chicken with kosher salt and black pepper. Cook until the chicken is mostly opaque on the sides, easily releases from the pan, and is nicely browned on the underside, 6 to 8 minutes.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Step 2

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Meanwhile, add chicken stock, apricot preserves, harissa paste and cinnamon to a large liquid measuring cup. Whisk well to combine and break up the jam.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Step 3

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Flip chicken over and let cook on the other side until lightly seared and no longer pink, 1 to 2 minutes. Pour in the harissa mixture, add the olives, and stir to scrape up any browned bits. Bring to a rapid simmer and cook until the sauce thickens and the chicken is fully cooked through, another 3 to 5 minutes. Taste for salt and adjust seasoning according to taste (this will depend on the chicken stock and harissa used).

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Step 4

method.title: Step 8
method.body: Serve immediately with crusty bread or couscous, spooning the sauce and olives over the chicken. Finish with a squeeze of lemon and a sprinkling of mint leaves, if desired.

method.title: Step 9
method.body: If you’d like to work ahead, the sauce mixture in Step 2 can be made up to 2 days in advance; store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.

expectedSnapshot.title: CARAMELISED ONION SMASHED BURGER TACOS
ingredients: 2.5 tbsp dill pickle finely diced + 1 tsp pickle juice
Note: Please use lean minced beef and very little oil to avoid greasy tacos.

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Caramelise the onions: Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a large frying pan over medium heat. Add the sliced onions, maple syrup and a pinch of salt. Cook for 25 minutes, stirring regularly, until the onions are deeply golden and soft. Add small splashes of water if the pan becomes dry. Set aside.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Make the burger sauce: In a small bowl, combine the Greek yoghurt, ketchup, mustard, garlic powder, coconut sugar and diced pickles. Mix well and set aside.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Prepare the smash tacos: Divide the mince into 8 equal balls. Place one ball onto each tortilla and press firmly with your hands to spread the meat in a thin layer right to the edges of the tortilla. Sprinkle generously with the BBQ seasoning.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Cook the tacos: Heat a large frying pan or griddle over medium-high heat.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Place the tacos meat-side down and cook for 2–3 minutes, pressing lightly so the meat browns and crisps.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Flip the tacos so the tortilla side is down. Place a slice of cheese on the meat, cover the pan and cook for 1-2 minutes, until the cheese melts and the tortilla is lightly toasted. Repeat with remaining tacos.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Assemble: Top each taco with shredded lettuce, caramelised onions, burger sauce and a sprinkle of fresh parsley. Serve immediately.

expectedSnapshot.title: Cheesy Salmon Tacos
ingredients: 1 lb salmon, cut into small chunks
Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
4 low-carb tortillas (my favorite is the Maria & Ricardo brand)
1 cup shredded mozzarella or Mexican-blend cheese
Lime wedges, for serving Light Crema Fresca Sauce (Optional)
2 tbsp mayo (or 1 tbsp mayo + 1 tbsp greek yogurt)

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Season the salmon with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and smoked paprika. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and cook the salmon for 2 to 3 minutes per side until just cooked through. Remove from the pan and set aside

method.title: Step 2
method.body: . 2. Place tortillas in a clean skillet over medium heat. Sprinkle cheese evenly over each tortilla and top with salmon. Fold in half and cook until the cheese melts and the tortillas are golden and crispy. Flip once to crisp the other side.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Optional: Combine 2 tbsp mayo (or 1 tbsp mayo + 1 tbsp greek yogurt), juice of 1/2 lime, 1-2 tbsp sriracha, 2 tsp rice vinegar and a pinch of salt and pepper to make a light crema fresca.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Remove from heat and garnish with chopped cilantro and optional light crema fresca. Serve warm with lime wedges

expectedSnapshot.author: Nik Sharma
ingredients: 1tablespoon fine sea salt, plus more as needed
1/4cup unsalted butter (1/2 stick), melted, or olive oil

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Step 1

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Heat oven to 425 degrees. Line a 9-by-13-inch high-heat baking dish with aluminum foil. In a large bowl, stir 1 tablespoon salt and the yogurt into 4 cups cold water. (The brine helps the chicken retain its moisture, for juicier breasts.) Add the chicken and let sit for 15 minutes.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Step 2

method.title: Step 4
method.body: In a small bowl, mix together butter, onion powder, garlic and chipotle powders, and black pepper until they form a paste.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Step 3

method.title: Step 6
method.body: After 15 minutes, drain the breasts, discarding liquid. Pat dry, transfer to the baking dish, and spread the paste all over the chicken.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Step 4

method.title: Step 8
method.body: Roast until the top is golden brown and the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees, about 30 minutes. If chicken is darkening too quickly, tent loosely with foil. Let the chicken cool, covered, for 5 minutes. Reserve the pan juices.

method.title: Step 9
method.body: Step 5

method.title: Step 10
method.body: About 10 minutes before the chicken is done, prepare the miso-garlic sauce: In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over medium-low heat. Remove from the heat and stir in garlic, lemon zest, black pepper and miso. Return to the heat and add the lemon juice and 2 tablespoons water, then mix until a velvety sauce forms. Remove from heat and stir in the reserved pan juices from the chicken. Taste and season with salt as needed.

method.title: Step 11
method.body: Step 6

method.title: Step 12
method.body: To serve, either slice the chicken breasts across the grain or keep them whole. Pour the sauce over the chicken and garnish with the minced scallions or chives. Serve immediately.

expectedSnapshot.title: Chinese meatball and cabbage soup!
ingredients: 1 1/2 tsp white pepper 2 tbsp light soy sauce
Mince the carrot, smash 30g of ginger and finely mince the remaining 10g. Thinly slice the Chinese leaf and separate the whites and greens of the spring onions.

method.title: Step 1
method.body: In a bowl, combine the minced carrot, ginger and the whites spring onions with the pork mince. Add all seasonings except the egg, and mix thoroughly. Then add the egg and slam the mixture down - folding and pressing it (this helps create a bouncy texture).

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Heat the smashed ginger in a wok or pot over medium heat for 1 minute to release its aroma. Add 1.5L water, white pepper, light soy sauce and sea salt flakes. Let it simmer briefly for 2 minutes.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Cup a portion of the meatball mix in your hand, close your fist and squeeze the meatball out - this shapes it neatly and keeps it compact.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Gently add the meatballs to the simmering broth. Cover with a lid and cook until the meatballs are tender and cooked through (about 8–10 minutes).

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Remove the lid, add the sliced Chinese leaf and green spring onions. Simmer for 2-3 more minutes until wilted. Drizzle with sesame oil before serving. Ver menos

items.title: Coconut Poached White Fish and Corn

expectedSnapshot.title: Coconut Poached White Fish and Corn
ingredients: 1 3/4 tsp Diamond Crystal kosher salt, plus more
1 1/2 lb boneless, skinless haddock fillets or other firm white fish, such as cod or halibut
1 serrano pepper or jalapeño, thinly sliced
1 tbsp lemon or lime juice, plus wedges for serving
White rice or thick-cut crusty toasted bread, for serving

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Add coconut milk, garlic, turmeric, cumin, coriander, and kosher salt to a medium pot over medium heat. Bring to a simmer and cook until the turmeric has bloomed and the poaching liquid is bright yellow and slightly thickened, about 5 minutes.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Add fish filets and corn kernels. Nudge fish filets into the coconut milk so they’re submerged in the poached liquid. Cover and let cook for 6-8 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and flakes easily.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Meanwhile, add chili, mint, cilantro and lemon juice to a small bowl and toss to coat. Season with a pinch or two of kosher salt.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Remove fish from heat and stir in lemon or lime juice. Serve fish and coconut sauce over rice or crusty bread. Scatter over dressed herb salad to finish and serve with lemon or lime wedges.

selected.title: Cold Noodles With Tomatoes
selected.author: Eric Kim
ingredients: 10 g kosher salt (or 6 g fine salt)
370 g dried thin wheat noodles (somyeon, somen, capellini, or similar)
2 scallions, thinly sliced on an angle (about 30 g)

method.title: Step 1
method.body: In a large bowl, toss together the tomatoes and salt. Let sit until juicy, about 10 minutes.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Meanwhile, bring a large pot of water to a boil. Cook the noodles according to package instructions, drain and rinse under cold water. Set aside.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Add the vinegar, soy sauce, sugar, garlic, mustard and sesame oil to the tomatoes, and toss with a spoon until well combined. Stir the filtered water into the tomatoes and sprinkle the surface of the broth with the sesame seeds, radishes and scallions.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Right before serving, add the ice to the broth. Divide the noodles among bowls, and ladle in the broth and any unmelted ice, making sure each serving gets a nice sprinkling of tomatoes, radishes, scallions and sesame seeds. Por ración (4 raciones)

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Add the silken tofu, tahini or peanut butter, red miso, gochugaru, soy sauce, rice vinegar, ice cubes and cold water to a blender. Blend until smooth. If it’s a bit thick, let it down with some extra cold water.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Cook the noodles in a large saucepan of boiling salted water, following pack instructions. Drain and rinse under cold water to cool completely.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Slice the cucumber into rounds, then into matchsticks. Thinly slice the spring onion. Thinly slice the cooked chicken — if you don’t have cooked chicken, roast, pan-fry or poach some instead.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Add the cold noodles, sauce and chicken to a mixing bowl with a few ice cubes and mix well. Add a splash more water if it’s too thick — you want a loose, saucy consistency.

method.title: Step 5

expectedSnapshot.title: Creamy Garlic Herb Cajun Chicken🍗🔥🥔
ingredients: 800g raw chicken thighs, boneless and skinless
3/4 tsp each salt, Italian herbs, chilli flakes, garlic powder, onion powder, parsley and paprika
800g raw white potatoes, peeled and diced into 1-inch chunks

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Oven-bake or air-fry the chicken for 22–25 minutes at 200°C / 400°F. Alternatively, cook it in a pan with a little butter for 4–5 minutes per side over medium heat.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Place the potatoes in a pot of cold water, bring to a boil and cook for 12–14 minutes until fork-tender. Drain, cover and steam for about 5 minutes, then mash with the room-temperature butter and warm milk.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Toast the sauce spices in the butter for 2 minutes over low heat. Add the milk, Parmigiano and spinach, stirring until smooth, creamy and slightly thick. Warm for 3–4 minutes.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Slice the chicken into cubes and serve with the mash. Store the creamy sauce separately if meal-prepping.

method.title: Step 22
method.body: 1.) Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius fan. In a large roasting tray, lay out the peeled and quartered potatoes. Nestle the chicken legs on top.

method.title: Step 23
method.body: 2.) Prepare the marinade by combining all the ingredients in a jug and whisking until smooth. Pour the marinade all over the chicken and potatoes, making sure all bits are coated (mix with your hands if needs be).

method.title: Step 24

method.title: Step 25
method.body: 4.) Serve immediately, with tzatziki and a mixed Greek salad (optional).

expectedSnapshot.title: Creamy Shrimp Orzo 🍤🍅
ingredients: 1 cup heavy cream or coconut milk

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Add olive oil to a large pan, medium heat, and let it heat up. Add shrimp, season with salt, garlic seasoning and crushed red pepper, and let cook for a few minutes each side until golden and mostly cooked through. Remove from pan and set aside.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Add some more olive oil to pan, add diced onion and sauté for 2-3 minutes before adding cherry tomatoes. Cook for 5 minutes until bursting and until they starten to soft. Add sun-dried tomatoes and stir. Crush tomatoes lightly by pressing down on them.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Add orzo to pan, along with cream and broth. Stir everything, add parmesan cheese and continue to stir. Cook for about 10 minutes until the orzo is cooked and most of the liquid has been absorbed. Stir often so that the dish doesn’t burn.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Once most of the liquid has been absorbed, add spinach, and stir in. Once wilted, remove from heat and serve with parmesan

method.body: In a bowl, combine cornstarch and salt and mix lightly. Add the chicken thighs and toss until every piece is fully coated.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Spray your air fryer basket with oil and place the chicken in a single layer. Spray the tops with additional oil and air fry at 400°F (205°C) for 15 minutes, shaking halfway through, until golden and crispy.

method.body: While the chicken cooks, combine soy sauce, honey, garlic, and water in a small pan. Bring to a simmer and cook until the sauce reduces and thickens to your desired consistency.

method.title: Step 6

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Serve the chicken over a fresh bowl of rice and optionally garnish with sesame seeds, scallions, and cucumbers.

expectedSnapshot.title: Garlic Mozzarella Cottage Cheese Flatbread
ingredients: Cottage cheese (1 cup) – the sneaky hero. Use small curd if you can, but whatever’s in your fridge works.
Eggs (2) – they hold the whole operation together.
Shredded mozzarella (1 cup) – aka the reason you’re here.
Grated Parmesan (2–3 tbsp) – optional, but it adds that salty “wow” factor.
Garlic (2–3 cloves, minced) – or more if you like living boldly.
Italian seasoning (1–2 tsp) – oregano/basil vibes in one shake.
Baking powder (1 tsp) – for a little lift, because we love a glow-up.
Salt (1/2 tsp) – adjust if your cheeses are salty.
Black pepper (1/4 tsp) – freshly cracked if you’re feeling fancy.
Optional toppings: chili flakes, parsley, extra mozzarella, garlic butter drizzle (chef behavior).

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Preheat your oven to 425°F (220°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Yes, parchment. Unless you enjoy scraping cheese cement off a pan.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Add cottage cheese and eggs to a bowl. Blend with an immersion blender (or regular blender) until mostly smooth. A few tiny curds are fine—this isn’t a skincare routine.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Stir in mozzarella, Parmesan (if using), minced garlic, Italian seasoning, baking powder, salt, and pepper. Mix until everything looks like a cheesy batter and you start feeling hungry.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Scoop the mixture onto your parchment-lined baking sheet. Spread into a flat oval or rectangle, about 1/4 to 1/2 inch thick. Keep it even, or you’ll get one side crispy and the other side... emotionally unprepared.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Bake for 15–18 minutes until golden and set. If it looks pale and sleepy, give it another 2–3 minutes.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: For extra browning, broil for 1–2 minutes at the end. Watch it like a hawk—broilers go from “perfect” to “charcoal art” fast.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Let it cool for 5 minutes. Slice and devour. Optional: sprinkle parsley or chili flakes for that “I know what I’m doing” look.

expectedSnapshot.title: GREEK CHICKEN SALAD
ingredients: 1.5 lb cooked diced chicken (rotisserie or leftover are okay; source also notes 1.2 kg)

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Add 1.5lb finely diced cooked chicken to a bowl. If you want to make chicken from scratch, grab 2lb (900gr) chicken, drizzle with 1 tbsp avocado oil, the juice of half a lemon, season with 1 tbsp garlic powder, 1 tbsp sweet paprika, 1 tbsp oregano, and a couple pinches salt and pepper. Mix really well, & bake in the oven at 400F for 40 mins, or air fry it.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: While the chicken is going, dice up your veggies. I finely chopped half an English cucumber, finely diced 1/2 red onion and 1 bell pepper, a large handful of fresh dill. I would have normally added black olives, but was out, but feel free to add if you like.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Now, the best part, the sauce! In a small food processor process 1/2 cup of a thick Greek yogurt, 2-3 tbsp mayo, zest of a full lemon, the juice of half a lemon, 2 tbsp fresh mint, 2 tbsp fresh dill, 1 garlic clove and a couple pinches of salt and pepper.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Once the chicken is done & cooled, finely dice it, then fold it into the sauce along with the rest of the ingredients.

Mix really well, & bake in the oven at 400F for 40 mins, or air fry it.

method.title: Step 2

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Marinate the chicken. Add 2 lbs chicken thighs 2lb (900gr) to a bowl with olive oil, juice of a lemon, salt, pepper, onion powder, and garlic powder. Mix it up. If you can, let it sit for a couple hours or overnight — but if you’re hungry, go right in.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Cook the chicken. Pan fry with avocado oil on medium heat. About 12–15 minutes total. I do 5 minutes on one side, flip for 5, flip for 2, flip for 1. Perfect every time.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Make the green goddess sauce. Throw into a blender: a big handful each of cilantro, parsley, basil, and chives; a smaller handful of mint and dill; 1 shallot; 2 garlic cloves; 1⁄2 cup crème fraîche, sour cream, or thick yogurt; zest and juice of 1 lemon; olive oil; salt; and pepper. Blend it until smooth, taste, adjust.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Pickled red onions. Thin slice a red onion, toss it with salt, sumac, and lemon juice. Let it sit 10–15 minutes, stirring a couple times.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: The base. I used Kaizen rice — boiled it for 5 minutes in salted water and chicken broth. You can also use cauli rice, quinoa, or regular rice if you want.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Build the bowl. Rice on the bottom, a handful of greens, chicken, pickled onions, radish, herbs, a big spoonful of that green goddess sauce, sesame seeds on top.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: That’s it. Fresh, loaded with protein, and tastes unreal.

items.title: Grilled Chicken Cracked Green Olive & Charred Lemon Dressing 🍋

expectedSnapshot.title: Grilled Chicken Cracked Green Olive & Charred Lemon Dressing 🍋
ingredients: Method Butterfly the chicken. Mix the olive oil, garlic, lemon zest, oregano, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Coat the chicken and set aside to marinate.
In a bowl, combine the rocket and shaved Parmesan. In another, mix the yoghurt with garlic, salt, and pepper, set aside.

method.title: Step 1
method.body: In a bowl, combine the rocket and shaved Parmesan. In another, mix the yoghurt with garlic, salt, and pepper, set aside.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Heat a dry griddle pan over medium-high heat. Place the lemon halves cut-side down and cook until charred, then remove. Clean the pan, then griddle the chicken for 2-3 minutes per side until golden and cooked through. Remove to rest. In the same pan with all the cooking juices, add the cracked olives, honey, vinegar, and the juice of the charred lemons, stirring to lift any pan juices. Spread the garlic yoghurt on plates, top with the chicken, spoon over the olive lemon dressing, and serve with the salad.

method.body: Heat a dry griddle pan over medium-high heat. Place the lemon halves cut-side down and cook until charred, then remove. Clean the pan, then griddle the chicken for 2-3 minutes per side until golden and cooked through. Remove to rest. In the same pan with all the cooking juices, add the cracked olives, honey, vinegar, and the juice of the charred lemons, stirring to lift any pan juices. Spread the garlic yoghurt on plates, top with the chicken, spoon over the olive lemon dressing, and serve with the salad.

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Cook Mode

method.title: Step 2
method.body: S

method.title: Step 3
method.body: 4 filo pastry sheets

method.title: Step 4
method.body: 30 g butter (2tbsp, melted)

method.title: Step 5
method.body: 200 g cooked chicken (7 oz, cut into bite-sized pieces)

method.title: Step 6
method.body: 100 g feta cheese (just under 1 cup, crumbled)

method.title: Step 7
method.body: 1 roasted red pepper (thinly sliced, (I used one from a jar))

method.title: Step 8
method.body: 60 g spinach (2 cups, wilted and chopped)

method.title: Step 9
method.body: 80 g yoghurt (about 1⁄3 cup)

method.title: Step 10
method.body: 1 tbsp harissa paste

method.title: Step 11
method.body: 70 g mozzarella (2⁄3 cup, grated, for topping)

method.title: Step 12
method.body: 1 tbsp chopped fresh coriander ((cilantro), for topping)

method.title: Step 13
method.body: Preheat your oven to 190°C / 375°F. Line a baking tray with parchment paper.

method.title: Step 14
method.body: Wilt the spinach by placing the leaves in a sieve and pouring boiling water over them. Cool under cold water, then squeeze out as much liquid as possible before chopping. Add the chicken, feta, roasted pepper, spinach, yoghurt, and harissa to a bowl. Mix until everything is evenly coated. Set aside.

method.title: Step 15
method.body: Working with one sheet of filo at a time (keep the remaining sheets covered with a damp towel so they don’t dry out), place it on a clean surface and cut it in half lengthways. Stack the two strips crosswise to form a “+” shape. Brush lightly with melted butter, then spoon about 2 heaped tablespoons of the filling into the centre. Scrunch the pastry edges up around the filling to create a nest shape, pressing gently to help it hold.

method.title: Step 16
method.body: Transfer to the prepared baking tray and repeat with the remaining pastry and filling. Brush any leftover butter over the tops and sprinkle generously with mozzarella. Bake for 15–20 minutes, or until the filo is crisp and golden and the cheese is melted and bubbly. Finish with a sprinkle of coriander and serve warm — before someone else eats your share.

expectedSnapshot.title: Harissa Steak Tacos
expectedSnapshot.author: Zaynab Issa
ingredients: 2 pounds hanger steak, cut into 4 equal-sized steaks (to use skirt or flank steak, see Tip)
Small corn or flour tortillas, warmed

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Step 1

method.title: Step 2
method.body: In a medium bowl, combine harissa paste, orange juice, garlic and 2 teaspoons salt. Add steaks and toss to coat. Marinate for 15 minutes, or cover and refrigerate for up to 24 hours.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Step 2

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Heat a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high. Add enough oil to cover the bottom of the skillet. Add the steaks and cook, flipping every few minutes, until steak reaches your desired doneness — for medium-rare, this will take 8 to 12 minutes (an instant-read thermometer inserted in the center will read 130 degrees). Transfer steaks to a cutting board to rest while you prepare the toppings and warm the tortillas.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Step 3

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Slice steak against the grain. Divide among tortillas and top with cucumbers, red onion, sour cream, cilantro and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Since flank and skirt steak are thinner cuts, they won’t fit into the pan in a single batch. If you’d like to cook them in batches, you may need to rinse and wipe out the pan between batches since the harissa tends to stick to the pan. Another option is to grill the steaks: Oil clean grill grates and set the grill to high. Once very hot, grill the steaks over direct heat until well browned, 3 to 5 minutes per side. Let rest for 5 minutes, then slice against the grain.

expectedSnapshot.title: HEALTHY SAUSAGE BREAKFAST MUFFINS
ingredients: 1 small courgette, grated and squeezed very dry
Large handful of spinach, finely chopped
4 slices cheese of choice (I like smoked cheddar)

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Line a baking tray with parchment (or prep your air fryer basket). Use two spoons to shape into 4 patties roughly the size of your muffins.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Bake at 220°C (200°C fan) for 12 minutes, flip, then bake 3–5 minutes more until browned on both sides and cooked through. Alternatively, air fry at 200°C for 10–12 minutes, flipping halfway, until golden and cooked through.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Mix the cottage cheese with the spring onions and chopped spinach. Add black pepper (and a pinch of salt if needed).

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Cut the muffins in half. Spread the cottage cheese mix over the bottom halves. Add a chicken patty, top with a slice of cheese, then close with the muffin top and press down gently. Wrap each muffin tightly and store in the fridge.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Fridge: Wrap and store for up to 4 days.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Freezer: Freeze wrapped for up to 3 months. Defrost fully before reheating for best texture.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Oven/Air Fryer: Split in half and reheat sausage side up at 170°C for 8–10 minutes until hot throughout and the cheese has melted.

method.title: Step 8
method.body: Microwave: Split in half, microwave at 600W for 30 seconds, flip, then 30–40 seconds until piping hot. (Finish in the air fryer for 1–2 minutes if you want it crisp.

method.title: Step 9
method.body: 50G PROTEIN STICKY MISO CHICKEN PREP BOXES

method.title: Step 10
method.body: AD This is the kind of lunch I like to prep as a nutritionist. These sticky miso chicken prep boxes are high-protein, fibre-rich and designed to prep like a dream. Filled with lots of Eat Well ingredients you can find in M&S Foodhalls by simply looking for the flower on pack.

method.title: Step 11
method.body: 350g mini chicken breast fillets (M&S)

method.title: Step 12
method.body: Miso glaze: 2 tsp miso, 2 tsp honey, 2 tbsp soy sauce, 2 garlic cloves (minced), 1 tsp grated ginger, 1 tbsp toasted sesame oil

method.title: Step 13
method.body: Rice salad: 250g cooked brown rice (cooled), 1 cucumber (deseeded + diced), 3 spring onions (chopped), a handful of coriander (chopped), soy sauce + rice vinegar to season

method.title: Step 14
method.body: Edamame hummus: 160g edamame, 1 tbsp tahini, 2 tbsp Greek yoghurt (M&S), juice of 1 lime, 1 tsp honey, 2 spring onions, salt + pepper

method.title: Step 15
method.body: Mix the miso, honey, soy sauce, garlic, ginger and toasted sesame oil. Add the chicken & marinate for 15–20 minutes.

method.title: Step 16
method.body: Air fry at 200C or pan-fry over a medium heat, turning regularly, until cooked, sticky and golden. Set aside to cool slightly.

method.title: Step 17
method.body: Blend the edamame, tahini, Greek yoghurt, lime juice, honey and spring onions. Season, adjust to taste.

method.title: Step 18
method.body: Mix the cooled brown rice with the cucumber, spring onions & coriander. Season with soy sauce & rice vinegar to taste. Divide the rice salad between three containers, top with the sticky miso chicken, add a dollop of edamame hummus and finish with pumpkin seeds.

method.title: Step 19
method.body: Store sealed in the fridge for up to 3 days.

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Add 6 thinly sliced Persian cucumbers to a bowl with 2 cups chopped or shredded chicken brst to a large bowl. Use whatever ratios you like here, but that’s what works best for me.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Finely dice 1/2 finely diced red onion and soak in water to remove some of the excess pungent smell, then finely chop a super large handful of fresh chopped parsley. The parsley does a lot of work here, so don’t be shy! Add it to the bowl with the onion after its soaked for about 5 minutes.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Make your dressing by mixing together 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, 2-3 tbsp mayo, the zest of 1 lemon, the juice of 1.5 to 2 lemons, 1 tbsp Dijon mustard, 1/2 tbsp olive oil, and some salt and pepper. Salt is key here, so make sure you add enough. Mix well, taste and adjust to your liking with more lemon juice, salt, or yogurt.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Pour your dressing over the bowl and toss really well so everything is evenly coated.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Finish this off with 3-4 tbsp chopped pistachios for some crunch and enjoy!

method.title: Step 6
method.body: If you make it, be sure to let me know on SHREDHAPPENS 🔥

expectedSnapshot.title: High Protein Sheet Pan Fish Tacos with Avocado Crema
ingredients: White fish: 1.5 lbs of cod, mahi mahi, or tilapia.
Olive oil: Extra virgin for the best heart-healthy fats.
Spices: A blend of smoked paprika, garlic powder, cumin, chili powder, and dried oregano.
Aromatics: Salt, black pepper, and a generous squeeze of fresh lime juice.
This avocado crema for fish tacos is a game changer.
Avocado: One ripe avocado for creaminess.
Flavor Boosters: Garlic, lime juice, fresh cilantro, and a pinch of salt.
Crunch: Shredded red cabbage and sliced cucumber.

method.body: Choosing the right protein is essential for a successful baked fish tacos recipe. You want a fish that is sturdy enough to handle high heat but mild enough to take on the spices.Dairy & Eggs

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Cod: My top choice for a lemon garlic baked cod recipe. It’s flaky, mild, and very accessible.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Mahi Mahi: A firmer choice that holds its shape exceptionally well on a sheet pan.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Halibut: A premium option with a thick, “steaky” texture.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Tilapia: A budget-friendly, thin fillet that cooks very quickly.

method.title: Step 8
method.body: When making oven baked fish tacos, look for “firm” white fish. These varieties won’t fall apart when you’re trying to nestle them into a warm tortilla.

method.title: Step 9
method.body: Seasoned raw cod for baked fish tacos recipe on a sheet pan.

method.title: Step 10
method.body: Season the Fish

method.title: Step 11
method.body: Preheat your oven to 425°F (220°C). Pat your fish dry with paper towels—this is the secret to getting a good sear in the oven. Cut the fish into 1-inch bite-sized pieces. In a small bowl, mix your olive oil and spices, then toss the fish until evenly coated.Cookware & Diningware

method.title: Step 12
method.body: Bake on a Sheet Pan

method.title: Step 13
method.body: Spread the fish in a single layer on a parchment-lined sheet pan. Bake for 10–12 minutes. For extra crispiness, you can turn on the broiler for the last 2 minutes.

method.title: Step 14
method.body: Make the Avocado Crema

method.title: Step 15
method.body: While the fish bakes, place the Greek yogurt, avocado, garlic, lime, and cilantro in a blender or food processor. Blend until completely smooth. If it’s too thick, add a teaspoon of water at a time until it reaches a drizzling consistency.

method.title: Step 16
method.body: Assemble the Tacos

method.title: Step 17
method.body: Warm your tortillas (corn or flour). Layer a handful of cabbage, a few pieces of the high protein fish tacos, a dollop of crema, and your favorite Mediterranean toppings like Feta and tomatoes.Baked Goods

items.title: High-Protein Peanut Sweet Potato Tofu Curry

expectedSnapshot.title: High-Protein Peanut Sweet Potato Tofu Curry
ingredients: 1-inch piece fresh ginger, peeled and finely chopped
680 g (11/2 lb) sweet potato, peeled and cut into 1-inch chunks
500 g extra-firm tofu, pressed and cut into 1-inch cubes
Salt and black pepper, to taste

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Heat the oil in a large skillet or Dutch oven over medium heat. Cook the onion for 5–6 minutes until softened.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Add the garlic, ginger, curry powder and red pepper flakes. Cook for 1 minute until fragrant.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Stir in the sweet potatoes and vegetable stock. Cover and simmer for about 10 minutes.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Whisk together the peanut butter, coconut milk and high-protein milk until smooth. Pour into the pan and stir well.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Add the tofu and simmer gently for another 10–12 minutes, until the sweet potatoes are tender and the sauce has thickened.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Stir in the peas and soy sauce. Cook for 2–3 minutes more. Season with salt and pepper to taste.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Finish with fresh cilantro, a squeeze of lime juice and, if desired, a sprinkle of chopped roasted peanuts.

method.title: Step 8
method.body: 8–9 g fiber

selected.title: High-Protein Peanut Sweet Potato Tofu Curry
ingredients: 1-inch piece fresh ginger, peeled and finely chopped
½–1 tsp crushed red pepper flakes
680 g (1½ lb) sweet potato, peeled and cut into 1-inch chunks
250 ml high-protein milk or skim milk
500 g extra-firm tofu, pressed and cut into 1-inch cubes
Salt and black pepper to taste
Fresh cilantro, lime wedges and chopped roasted peanuts, for serving

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Heat the oil in a large skillet or Dutch oven over medium heat and cook the onion for 5–6 minutes.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Add the garlic, ginger, curry powder and red pepper flakes and cook for 1 minute.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Stir in the sweet potato and stock, cover and simmer for about 10 minutes.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Whisk the peanut butter, coconut milk and high-protein milk until smooth, then add to the pan.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Add the tofu and simmer for 10–12 minutes, until the sweet potato is tender and the sauce has thickened.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Stir in the peas and soy sauce and cook for another 2–3 minutes. Season to taste.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Finish with cilantro, lime and chopped peanuts, if desired.

expectedSnapshot.title: High-Protein Shrimp Fried Rice
ingredients: 4 cups cooked short-grain rice (preferably day-old sushi or brown rice)
2 tbsp neutral oil (grapeseed, sunflower or avocado oil)
1 bunch scallions, thinly sliced, whites and greens separated
11/2 tsp fine sea salt (plus more to taste)
5 garlic cloves, finely grated or minced
1 tsp fish sauce or soy sauce
680 g (11/2 lb) medium or large shrimp, peeled and deveined
1 jalapeño or serrano chile, finely chopped
Freshly ground black pepper, to taste

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Heat 1 tablespoon of the neutral oil in a large wok or skillet over medium-high heat.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Add the shrimp, season lightly with salt and cook for 2–3 minutes until just pink. Transfer to a plate.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Add the remaining oil to the pan. Cook the white parts of the scallions for about 2 minutes.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Stir in the garlic, ginger and chile. Cook for 30–60 seconds until fragrant.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Add the cooked rice, breaking up any clumps. Stir-fry for 3–4 minutes until heated through.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Season with the fish sauce (or soy sauce) and sesame oil. Toss well.

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Return the shrimp to the pan along with the green parts of the scallions. Stir-fry for 1–2 minutes until everything is hot.

method.title: Step 8
method.body: Finish with the lime juice, black pepper and additional soy sauce or sesame oil to taste.

method.title: Step 9
method.body: 2–3 g fiber

items.title: Honey Lime Chicken and Avocado Wonton Tacos

expectedSnapshot.title: Honey Lime Chicken and Avocado Wonton Tacos

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Marinate: Whisk honey, lime juice, garlic, and spices. Toss with chicken and marinate for 10 minutes.Fruits & Vegetables

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Bake Shells: Place wonton wrappers in an upside-down muffin tin to form taco shapes. Spray with olive oil. Bake at 375°F for 5–7 minutes until golden.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Cook Chicken: Sauté chicken in a skillet over medium-high heat for 6–8 minutes until fully cooked and the sauce has reduced to a sticky glaze.

method.title: Step 4
method.body: Prep Topping: Mix avocado, tomatoes, onion, cilantro, and lime juice in a small bowl.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Assemble: Fill each crispy shell with a spoonful of chicken and top with the avocado mixture. Serve immediately.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Avoid Sogginess: Only assemble tacos immediately before serving. If meal prepping, store the chicken, topping, and shells in separate containers.Mediterranean Cuisine

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Wonton Wrapper Tip: Ensure you use “Wonton” wrappers, not “Egg Roll” wrappers, as the latter are too large and will not fit the muffin tin trick properly.

method.title: Step 8
method.body: Honey Substitution: If you don’t have honey, agave nectar works as a 1:1 substitute and maintains the caramelization.

method.title: Step 9
method.body: Check Your Heat: Because of the honey content, the chicken can burn quickly. Keep the heat at medium-high and stir frequently to ensure a glaze rather than a char.

method.title: Step 10
method.body: Shell Storage: Baked shells stay crispy for up to 24 hours if kept in a sealed Ziploc bag at room temperature with all air removed. Do not refrigerate.

method.title: Step 11
method.body: Grasas: 8,8 g

expectedSnapshot.author: Sarah DiGregorio
ingredients: 1 ½ to 2 pounds boneless, skinless chicken thighs
3 (4-ounce) cans hot or mild chopped green chiles (not drained)
1 bell pepper, sliced into ¼-inch wide strips
2 tablespoons Tajín seasoning, plus more for serving

method.title: Method
method.body:
Step 1

Combine the chicken, beans, green chiles, bell pepper, garlic, Tajín, oil, onion powder and cumin in a 6- to 8-quart slow cooker. Season with 1½ teaspoons salt. Cook on low until the chicken is tender and the pepper is soft, 4 hours.

Step 2

Break the chicken into large chunks using two forks. Serve topped with queso fresco and more Tajin to taste.

selected.title: https://cooking.nytimes.com/recipes/1026792-slow-cooker-tajin-chicken-and-peppers?campaign_id=90&emc=edit_fwd_20260719&instance_id=178923&nl=five-weeknight-dishes&regi_id=91679501&segment_id=223359&user_id=179611e20a6fcbee6e20e79567151251
selected.author: Sarah DiGregorio
ingredients: 1 ½ to 2 pounds boneless, skinless chicken thighs
3 (4-ounce) cans hot or mild chopped green chiles (not drained)
1 bell pepper, sliced into ¼-inch wide strips
2 tablespoons Tajín seasoning, plus more for serving

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Step 1 Combine the chicken, beans, green chiles, bell pepper, garlic, Tajín, oil, onion powder and cumin in a 6- to 8-quart slow cooker. Season with 1½ teaspoons salt. Cook on low until the chicken is tender and the pepper is soft, 4 hours. Step 2 Break the chicken into large chunks using two forks. Serve topped with queso fresco and more Tajin to taste.

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Start with 1lb lean ground beef. Season with a couple generous pinches salt, fresh cracked pepper, and 2 tsp garlic powder. Mix well. Then form into small, thin patties, you’ll get 6-8 patties depending on how thin you make them. .

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Put the patties on a piece of parchment paper, top with your favorite low carb tortilla, put parchment paper on top and apply some weight on top to spread it out. You want to have a thin layer of the meat covering the surface of the tortilla. I used my hands, but you can use a rolling pin or a bottle, too. .

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Spread 1 tsp of mustard over each pattie. Let sit while you make the onions & sauce. . 4.To make the caramelized onion, dice up 1 large yellow onion. Add 1tbsp butter to a pan on medium-low heat, add the diced onion & a couple pinches salt, and stir frequently until caramelized. Be patient here, its worth it. I like to add 1 tbsp balsamic here to help it get a nice color when they’re almost done. When done, turn off heat & set aside. .

method.title: Step 4
method.body: To make the sauce, mix 2 tbsp avocado oil mayo, 2 tbsp unsweetened ketchup, 2 tsp white vinegar, 1/2 tsp powdered monkfruit sweetener, 1/2 tsp smoked paprika, 1 tbsp relish (or 1/2 a small dill pickle, grated). Mix well, taste, & adjust to your taste. .

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Spray a pan with cooking spray. Put the tortilla with the meat side down on medium-high heat for 2-3 mins, pressing it down with a spatula to get a nice crust. Flip, tilt a little bit to get rid of any excess moisture from the ground beef, then cook for a minute on the tortilla side down. . 7.Place a thin slice of your favorite cheese on the tortilla meat side up & put the lid on for a few seconds to melt. Remove, then top with your favorite toppings. I added lettuce, tomato, a tablespoon or so of the onions, and some of the sauce. . ENJOY! . . .

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Put the patties on a piece of parchment paper, top with your favorite low carb tortilla, put parchment paper on top and apply some weight on top to spread it out. You want to have a thin layer of the meat covering the surface of the tortilla. I used my hands, but you can use a rolling pin or a bottle, too. .

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Spread 1 tsp of mustard over each pattie. Let sit while you make the onions & sauce. . 4.To make the caramelized onion, dice up 1 large yellow onion. Add 1tbsp butter to a pan on medium-low heat, add the diced onion & a couple pinches salt, and stir frequently until caramelized. Be patient here, its worth it. I like to add 1 tbsp balsamic here to help it get a nice color when they’re almost done. When done, turn off heat & set aside. .

method.title: Step 4
method.body: To make the sauce, mix 2 tbsp avocado oil mayo, 2 tbsp unsweetened ketchup, 2 tsp white vinegar, 1/2 tsp powdered monkfruit sweetener, 1/2 tsp smoked paprika, 1 tbsp relish (or 1/2 a small dill pickle, grated). Mix well, taste, & adjust to your taste. .

method.title: Step 5
method.body: Spray a pan with cooking spray. Put the tortilla with the meat side down on medium-high heat for 2-3 mins, pressing it down with a spatula to get a nice crust. Flip, tilt a little bit to get rid of any excess moisture from the ground beef, then cook for a minute on the tortilla side down. . 7.Place a thin slice of your favorite cheese on the tortilla meat side up & put the lid on for a few seconds to melt. Remove, then top with your favorite toppings. I added lettuce, tomato, a tablespoon or so of the onions, and some of the sauce. . ENJOY! . . .

expectedSnapshot.title: Korean Beef Bulgogi Chris Lee
ingredients: 650g Thinly Sliced Beef (Flat Iron as its leaner)
1 Tsp Garlic Powder or Minced Garlic
Pinch of Gochugaru or Chili powder

method.title: Step 1
method.body: Into a blender add the following ingredients: 1⁄4 Asian Pear, 1⁄2 Onion, 2 Cloves of Garlic , 1⁄4 Cup Soy Sauce, 10ml Sesame Oil, 10ml Honey, 2 Tbsp Stevia, 2 Tsp Black pepper, 2 Tsp Salt and blend

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Into a large bowl, combine the beef and marinade. Mix well and let the mixture marinade for a minimum of 30min and up to 24hours (Longer the better).

method.title: Step 3
method.body: Into a container add the following ingredients 1 Cucumber sliced, 1 Tsp Minced Garlic powder, 1 Tsp Brown Stevia, 5ml Sesame Oil, 5ml Soy Sauce, Pinch of Gochugaru or Chili powder, Salt and Pepper

method.title: Step 4
method.body: 4.. Close and shake until even coated.

method.title: Step 5
method.body: On a medium high heat, spray your pan with cooking spray and place the meat. Spread out evenly and place 1⁄2 onion sliced on top.

method.title: Step 6
method.body: Stir occasionally, separating any visible clumps. Take off the heat when the beef is finished cooking and the liquid has turned into a crystallized glaze (thickened).

method.title: Step 7
method.body: Separate into 3 equal portions, serve on 125g of white rice, garnish with sesame seeds, green onions and enjoy!

items.title: KOTÓPOULO LEMONÁTO STO FOURNÓ Greek Lemon Chicken

expectedSnapshot.title: KOTÓPOULO LEMONÁTO STO FOURNÓ Greek Lemon Chicken
ingredients: 1 Preheat the oven to 180°C fan (400°F), Gas Mark 6. Spatchcock the 2 chickens by placing them breast-side down on a flat surface. Using a sharp knife, cut along either side of the backbone to open up the carcass. Lay the flattened birds side by side in a large roasting tray.

method.title: Step 1
method.body: 2 Make the marinade by stirring together the ingredients in a jar. Pour half over the spatchcocked birds, flip the chickens over, then pour the rest of the marinade over the other side. Cover the tray with a sheet of foil and bake for 45 minutes.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: After this time, remove the foil and increase the temperature to 200°C fan (425°F), Gas Mark 7. Return the tray to the oven and cook the chickens for a further 12–15 minutes until golden brown on top.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: 4 Carve the 2 chickens, cutting off the thighs, drumsticks, breasts and wings as portions, and serve.

expectedSnapshot.title: LEMON + HERB CHICKEN + POTATO TRAYBAKE.
ingredients: organic steamed French beans, to serve
Layer the Foundation: Preheat oven to 200°C. Layer the organic leek, baby potatoes, + bay leaves directly into the tray. Drizzle with organic EVOO, toss to coat, + arrange the rosemary sprigs on top.
Structure the Protein: Pat the chicken thighs dry + arrange them over the vegetable framework. Top with lemon slices, a final drizzle of EVOO, salt, + freshly ground black pepper.

method.title: Step 1
method.body: The Initial Roast: Roast uncovered for 20 minutes until the chicken skin crisps + the fats render down to confit the leeks.

method.title: Step 2
method.body: Enrich the Framework: Carefully pour the bone broth into the base of the pan. Return to the oven for 15–20 minutes until the chicken is cooked through + the potatoes are meltingly soft.

method.title: Step 3
method.body: The Elegant Finish: Scatter freshly chopped parsley over the top + serve alongside organic steamed French beans.
